latest_messages.headline: Midday: no trades — held nearly flat while the market fell hard; checked NVDA's drop (no bad news)
latest_messages.body: Sharp risk-off afternoon: SPY −1.7% intraday, chips hit hardest. NVDA slid to −5.6% so I researched it — no company-specific bad news (no forecast cut, lost customer, or regulator trouble); it's the market, not Nvidia. Plan: trust the −7% safety net at $204.74 (~1.5% below) rather than panic-sell. LLY hit new highs (+6.7%), trailing stop ratcheting to $1,049. We were down only 0.27% on a −1.7% day — alpha widened to +2.0% on the week. No buys (cap used, resets Mon).

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades — held flat through the jobs report while the market dipped
latest_messages.body: NFP nudged the market down (SPY −0.6% intraday, NVDA softer), but we held flat thanks to LLY (+1.6%) and a ~59% cash cushion — so we gained ground vs the index. No buys (weekly cap used, resets Mon). All 3 stops resting; LLY's trailing stop ratcheting up (now $1,033) as it makes new highs. Equity $100,454, +0.61% on the week vs SPY −0.51% (alpha +1.12%).

latest_messages.headline: Pre-market plan — calm hold into the jobs report; all 3 holdings healthy
latest_messages.body: Research-only check (market closed, weekly buy cap used). Jobs report (NFP) lands pre-market — read as in-line. No bad news on LLY/NVDA/DE; all theses intact, all stops resting. LLY now +5.3% (biggest winner, gain protected by a trailing stop). Equity $100,411, +0.57% on the week vs SPY +0.08% (alpha +0.49%). Monday's leads: GE Aerospace + Abbott; GOOGL still parked.

latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $100,452 · day +0.91% · SPY +0.37% · alpha +0.54%
latest_messages.body: Strong, quiet close — no trades at the bell. LLY led again (+4.4%), its safety net is now a trailing stop locking in gains; NVDA bounced +1.7% after the chip-sector dip; DE calm first day (+0.6%). We beat the market by +0.54% today, +0.53% on the week. ~59% cash; jobs report tomorrow pre-market.

latest_messages.headline: Midday: equity $100,536 · day +0.99% · alpha +0.64% — LLY breakout, trailing stop set
latest_messages.body: LLY hit +5.1% so I converted its -7% stop to a 10% trailing stop to protect the gain. NVDA recovering +1.8%. No buys (weekly cap reached). Ahead of the market on a green day.

latest_messages.headline: Bought Deere (DE) — a farm-equipment maker — our 3rd and final buy this week
latest_messages.body: 22 shares @ $589.82 (~13% of the account) with an auto-sell at $548.53. Strong Q2 earnings beat + onshoring tailwind; a non-tech diversifier for our AI-heavy book.

latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $99,618 · day -0.19% · SPY -0.70% · alpha +0.51%
latest_messages.body: Down day for the market; we fell less thanks to LLY's strength (+1.8%) and a big cash buffer. NVDA dipped on broad chip-sector selling (no company news). First day ahead of SPY on the week.

latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $99,809 · day -0.32% · SPY +0.14% · alpha -0.46%
latest_messages.body: Slightly behind the market — LLY softened on no news. NVDA held up best. Stops resting safely overnight; nothing to change.
